data.title: MRPeasy Tutorial: Step-by-Step Guide for Manufacturers
data.excerpt: This step-by-step tutorial shows how MRPeasy can transform your small manufacturing business with integrated management. Sign up for a free trial today!

$media.alt: MRPeasy Tutorial: Step-by-Step Guide for Manufacturers

children.text: Disclosure: Some links in this post are affiliate links, meaning I may earn a commission if you make a purchase.
Introduction to MRPeasy: Your Manufacturing Game-Changer

I remember when I first stumbled upon MRPeasy—it felt like finding a hidden gem for small manufacturers. This ERP software is designed specifically for businesses with 10-200 employees, offering an integrated platform for inventory, production, purchasing, and accounting. What sets it apart is how it packs serious power into an interface that's genuinely easy to use. Whether you're struggling with spreadsheets or juggling disconnected tools, MRPeasy streamlines everything into one system. Curious?
Explore MRPeasy with a free trial
and see how it can simplify your operations from day one. For more on what MRPeasy is, check out
what it is
Step 1: Sign Up and Set Up Your Account

Getting started with MRPeasy is straightforward. Head to their website, and you can sign up for a free trial—no credit card required. The setup wizard guides you through basic configurations like company details, currency, and language settings. I love how intuitive it is; within minutes, you're ready to dive into the core features. This initial step is crucial because it tailors the system to your business needs right from the start. Many users, like those in
MRPeasy use cases
, find that this simplicity accelerates their onboarding, letting them focus on growth rather than technical hurdles.
Step 2: Define Your Products and Bill of Materials

Once your account is set, it's time to add your products and create Bills of Materials (BOMs). MRPeasy allows you to list components, set quantities, and even track variants. I've seen small manufacturers save hours here by eliminating manual data entry. For example, if you produce custom furniture, you can define each piece with its materials, and the system automatically calculates costs and inventory needs. This step ensures accuracy in production planning, which is a lifesaver for maintaining quality and efficiency. Don't miss out on exploring
new features
that enhance BOM management, like drag-and-drop rescheduling.
Step 3: Plan and Track Production

This is where MRPeasy shines. Use the production planning tools to schedule work orders, assign tasks, and monitor progress in real-time. The drag-and-drop rescheduling feature is fantastic—when priorities shift, you can adjust plans without breaking a sweat. I recall a case where a manufacturer doubled their capacity by using MRPeasy's scheduling to optimize machine usage and reduce downtime. The reporting via internet-kiosk keeps everyone on the shop floor informed, reducing errors and boosting productivity. To get the most out of this, see
why choose MRPeasy
for insights into its reliability and support.
Step 4: Manage Inventory and Purchasing

Inventory management is another area where MRPeasy excels. The warehouse management system (WMS) lets you track stock levels, set reorder points, and manage lot traceability. For purchasing, you can generate purchase orders automatically based on production needs or inventory thresholds. This integration prevents stockouts and overstocking, which is critical for cash flow. I've worked with businesses that reduced inventory costs by 20% after adopting MRPeasy—it's that effective. If you're new to MRP software, this step-by-step approach demystifies the process, making it accessible even for those without technical backgrounds.
Step 5: Integrate with Your Favorite Tools

MRPeasy isn't an island; it plays nicely with other software through integrations. Connect it with QuickBooks Online or Xero for seamless accounting, Shopify or Magento for e-commerce, or Zapier for custom automations. This means your sales orders sync instantly, and financial data flows without manual intervention. In my experience, these integrations save time and reduce errors, allowing you to focus on scaling your business. For tips on optimizing these connections, explore
MRPeasy tips
on best practices.
New and Featured Functions in MRPeasy

MRPeasy is always evolving, with recent updates that enhance usability and power. New features include advanced workforce planning, improved multi-currency support, and AI-powered insights for better decision-making. These additions make it even more robust for small manufacturers aiming to compete with larger players. For instance, the supply chain management tools now offer real-time supplier tracking, which is a game-changer for procurement efficiency. I recommend checking out
MRPeasy's new features
regularly to stay ahead of the curve.
Who is MRPeasy Ideal For?

MRPeasy is perfect for small manufacturers and distributors with 10-200 employees who need an affordable, comprehensive ERP system. It's particularly ideal for companies in industries like woodworking, electronics, or food production, where production planning and inventory control are vital. If you're tired of fragmented software and want a single source of truth for your operations, MRPeasy is your solution. Users often praise its value, noting it outperforms more expensive alternatives for ROI and support. See how it compares in
why choose MRPeasy
for a deeper look.

Start your MRPeasy free trial now
and experience the difference it makes. With its award-winning features and supportive community, it's a step you won't regret taking.

children.text: Is MRPeasy easy to use for non-technical users?

Absolutely! MRPeasy is designed with a user-friendly interface and guided setups, making it accessible for small business owners and teams without deep technical expertise. The intuitive drag-and-drop features and clear documentation ensure a smooth learning curve.
What integrations does MRPeasy support?

MRPeasy integrates seamlessly with popular tools like QuickBooks Online, Xero, Shopify, Magento, WooCommerce, and Zapier, allowing you to connect accounting, e-commerce, and automation workflows effortlessly for streamlined operations.
Is there a free trial available for MRPeasy?

Yes, MRPeasy offers a free trial with no credit card required. This lets you explore all core features, from production planning to inventory management, so you can see how it fits your business before committing.
